scripts.build: echo 'Worker build is handled by wrangler during deployment'
scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env production --remote
scripts.db:reset:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command 'DROP TABLE IF EXISTS documents; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS document_types; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS document_references; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS document_facets; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS document_permissions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS session; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS account; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS user; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS verification;' && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
